name: record-and-replay
description: Record Linux workflows and turn them into reusable Codex skills.

interface.longDescription: Record & Replay captures a Linux desktop or browser workflow as a semantic event stream, including explicit user markers and spoken transcript context, drafts a reusable Codex skill, and imports that skill after inspection. It uses Linux Computer Use diagnostics and avoids raw coordinate macro replay.
defaultPrompt: Record a skill for this workflow
Watch me do this task and turn it into a skill
Record my daily workflow and make it reusable
